company.name: BluArc, LLC
company.tagline: Independent app development for focused, useful software.
company.description: BluArc, LLC designs and maintains simple, reliable apps across Apple and mobile platforms. Our work is built to be clear, respectful of privacy, and easy to support.
company.supportMessage: For app support, privacy questions, or account-related requests, contact us by email and include the app name in your message.

apps.name: Puzzlefy
apps.longDescription: Puzzlefy is a clean puzzle game experience designed for quick sessions and thoughtful play.

privacy.informationCollected: Puzzlefy may collect information needed to provide accounts, purchases, custom photo puzzles, ads, support, and app functionality. This may include account identifiers such as email address or sign-in provider information, app user ID, purchase/subscription status, device and app information, diagnostic data, ad-related identifiers or signals, and messages you send to support. If you upload a custom photo to create a puzzle, Puzzlefy may process and store that photo and related puzzle data so the feature can work.
privacy.howInformationIsUsed: Information is used to create and manage accounts, authenticate users, provide app features, generate custom photo puzzles, save or sync app data, verify purchases or subscriptions, show and measure ads, improve reliability, prevent abuse, respond to support requests, and comply with legal or app store requirements. Uploaded photos are used to provide the custom puzzle feature and are not sold by BluArc, LLC.
privacy.thirdPartyServices: Puzzlefy uses Firebase and related Google services, which may include Firebase Authentication, Firebase Storage, Firebase database services, Firebase Analytics, Crashlytics, Cloud Functions, and Google advertising services such as Google Mobile Ads or AdMob. Puzzlefy may also use Apple App Store services and Google Play services for purchases, distribution, subscriptions, refunds, and app platform functionality. These third-party services may process data according to their own privacy policies.
privacy.adsAnalyticsDisclosure: Puzzlefy may display ads and may use advertising and analytics technologies to deliver ads, limit fraud, measure performance, understand app usage, and improve the app. Depending on your device settings and consent choices, ads may use identifiers such as Apple's Identifier for Advertisers, Google advertising ID, device information, approximate location, ad interactions, and app activity. You can manage ad tracking preferences through your device settings and applicable consent prompts.
privacy.childrensPrivacy: Puzzlefy is not directed to children under 13 and does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. Some app features, such as accounts, custom photo uploads, purchases, and advertising, may involve data collection or third-party processing. If you believe a child has provided personal information without appropriate consent, contact us so we can review and delete it where required.
privacy.updates: We may update this privacy policy from time to time, including when app features, Firebase services, ads, purchases, account features, or photo upload functionality change. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

terms.acceptance: By downloading, accessing, or using Puzzlefy, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.permittedUse: Puzzlefy is provided for personal, lawful use. You agree not to misuse the app, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, or use it in a way that violates applicable laws.
terms.purchases: If Puzzlefy offers paid downloads, subscriptions, or in-app purchases, those transactions are handled by the applicable app store. Refunds, billing, and cancellation rules are managed by that store's policies.
terms.userContent: If Puzzlefy allows you to create, save, or share content, you are responsible for that content and for ensuring you have the rights needed to use it.
terms.disclaimers: Puzzlefy is provided as is and as available. We work to keep it useful and reliable, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
terms.limitationOfLiability: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BluArc, LLC is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of Puzzlefy.
terms.termination: We may suspend or discontinue access to Puzzlefy if these terms are violated or if the app is no longer supported.
terms.changes: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

apps.name: QuietWord
apps.description: A King James Version Bible app.
apps.longDescription: QuietWord is a King James Version Bible app built for calm reading, listening, and study.

privacy.informationCollected: QuietWord does not collect personal data from users.
privacy.howInformationIsUsed: Because QuietWord does not collect personal data, no personal information is used for tracking, profiling, or advertising.
privacy.thirdPartyServices: QuietWord may use platform services provided by Apple for app distribution, crash reporting, purchases, or basic device functionality.
privacy.adsAnalyticsDisclosure: QuietWord does not include third-party advertising or analytics SDKs unless this policy is updated to disclose them.
privacy.childrensPrivacy: QuietWord is not intended to knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us so we can address it.
privacy.updates: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

terms.acceptance: By downloading, accessing, or using QuietWord, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
terms.permittedUse: QuietWord is provided for personal, lawful use. You agree not to misuse the app, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, or use it in a way that violates applicable laws.
terms.purchases: If QuietWord offers paid downloads, subscriptions, or in-app purchases, those transactions are handled by the applicable app store. Refunds, billing, and cancellation rules are managed by that store's policies.
terms.userContent: If QuietWord allows you to create, save, or share content, you are responsible for that content and for ensuring you have the rights needed to use it.
terms.disclaimers: QuietWord is provided as is and as available. Bible text, reading tools, and related app features are provided for personal reference and are not a substitute for professional advice.
terms.limitationOfLiability: To the maximum extent permitted by law, BluArc, LLC is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of QuietWord.
terms.termination: We may suspend or discontinue access to QuietWord if these terms are violated or if the app is no longer supported.
terms.changes: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
